'''âch-j-v-ch''' ('''kachajvechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobby|lobby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobby|lobby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-j-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kachajvechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichajvechoko|thichajvechoko]] || [[word:jichajvechoko|jichajvechoko]] || [[word:shichajvechoko|shichajvechoko]] || [[word:kichajvechoko|kichajvechoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
